title: Automatic Smelt tools
description: tools that let every block you break that can be smelted will automatically drop its smelted form instead of the raw material.
body:
# Auto Smelt Enchantment Datapack

> **Craft special Auto Smelt tools that smelt blocks as you mine!**
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hS8BmzrO/images/8df453680240f9efa5cde1e81a7fd3bd8f0634e1.gif)

## Overview

adds a new craftable "enchantment" system to Minecraft. Unlike the always-on Auto Smelt , this version requires you to **craft special tools** that have the auto-smelting ability.

Regular tools work normally only Auto Smelt tools will smelt blocks!

---

## What Does It Do?

### Crafting Auto Smelt Tools
Combine a **Furnace** with any tool in a crafting table (shapeless recipe):

```text
Furnace + Pickaxe = Auto Smelt Pickaxe
Furnace + Shovel  = Auto Smelt Shovel
Furnace + Hoe     = Auto Smelt Hoe
```

Supported Tool Tiers(iron, diamond and netherite)

### Auto Smelt Effects by Tool

| Tool | Blocks Affected | Result |
|------|-----------------|--------|
| **Pickaxe** | Iron, Gold, Copper, Ancient Debris | Ingots/Scraps |
| **Shovel** | Sand, Red Sand, Clay | Glass, Bricks |
| **Hoe** | Kelp | Dried Kelp |

##Recipie
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8d20bc12eae4a1d38307547fd18464d4e6a4c13.png)

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/function autosmelt_enchant:give_pickaxe` | Get Auto Smelt Iron Pickaxe |
| `/function autosmelt_enchant:give_shovel` | Get Auto Smelt Iron Shovel |
| `/function autosmelt_enchant:give_hoe` | Get Auto Smelt Iron Hoe |

### Disable and enable
| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/datapack disable "file/AutoSmelt_Enchant_Datapack"` | Disable the datapack |
| `/datapack enable "file/AutoSmelt_Enchant_Datapack"` | Re-enable the datapack |
| `/reload` | Reload all datapacks |
